pr.title: Fix sysdolphin includes, add cobj.h, use cobj.h in lbvector
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Added a new sysdolphin baselib camera object header, cobj.h, and replaced lbvector.c's local anonymous camera-layout struct with HSD_CObj fields and projection constants. The PR also normalized many sysdolphin include paths to explicit project-root paths or system-style includes, and made dolphin/mtx.h include the types and matrix type headers it depends on.
what_changed: Created src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.h defining HSD_CObj, HSD_CObjDesc, HSD_CObjInfo, HSD_CameraAnim, and projection type macros PROJ_PERSPECTIVE, PROJ_FRUSTRUM, and PROJ_ORTHO.
Moved camera layout knowledge out of lbvector.c by deleting the local Struct8000E210 and changing func_80369688 and func_8000E210 signatures to use HSD_CObj*.
Updated func_8000E210 to read named HSD_CObj fields such as near, far, viewport_left, viewport_right, viewport_top, viewport_bottom, and projection_param instead of raw unk/filler offsets.
Replaced numeric projection cases in lbvector.c with PROJ_PERSPECTIVE and PROJ_ORTHO constants from cobj.h.
Changed include/dolphin/mtx.h to include dolphin/types.h and dolphin/mtx/mtxtypes.h before declaring C_MTXOrtho and C_MTXPerspective.

Normalized many sysdolphin baselib source and header includes from local relative names like "aobj.h" or "object.h" to explicit paths such as "sysdolphin/baselib/aobj.h" and "sysdolphin/baselib/object.h".
Converted several project/global headers to angle-bracket includes, for example <global.h> and <dolphin/types.h>.
Fixed include/dolphin/types.h to end with a newline.
smart_moves: Promoted a locally reverse-engineered camera memory layout into a shared HSD_CObj header, making future camera-related decompilation reusable instead of duplicating offset structs.
Used named union members for projection parameters, allowing the same offsets to be expressed as perspective fov/aspect or ortho/frustum top/bottom/left/right depending on projection type.
Kept the existing lbvector matching logic mostly intact while improving type accuracy, which reduces risk in a decompilation codebase where small C changes can affect generated assembly.
Made dolphin/mtx.h self-sufficient for its public prototypes by including the headers that define f32, Mtx44, and related matrix types.
Standardized sysdolphin include paths, which helps avoid accidental resolution against the wrong local header as more baselib files are added.
decomp_lessons: When a source file contains an ad hoc struct used only to match offsets, move it into the appropriate baselib header once the object identity is known; this improves both readability and cross-file type consistency.
Replace unknown fields gradually with semantic names only where the layout evidence is strong. Here, viewport and projection fields were mapped directly from existing offsets in func_8000E210.
Use projection-type macros instead of magic switch constants once the enum-like meaning is known; it documents control flow without changing the algorithm.
Headers should include the types they expose in their own declarations rather than relying on include order elsewhere.
For project-internal library headers, explicit include paths such as "sysdolphin/baselib/foo.h" are safer than short relative includes in a growing decomp tree.
naming_conventions: Baselib object types use HSD_* names, for example HSD_CObj, HSD_CObjDesc, HSD_CObjInfo, HSD_CameraAnim, HSD_Obj, and HSD_ObjInfo.
Sysdolphin struct tags follow underscored forms such as struct _HSD_CObj and typedef to HSD_CObj.
Projection constants are uppercase PROJ_PERSPECTIVE, PROJ_FRUSTRUM, and PROJ_ORTHO.

Camera fields use descriptive snake_case names matching object semantics and offsets, such as viewport_left, viewport_right, viewport_top, viewport_bottom, projection_type, projection_param, view_mtx, and proj_mtx.
Forward references to other baselib objects use struct _HSD_WObj, struct _HSD_AObj, struct _HSD_WObjDesc, struct _HSD_AObjDesc, and struct _HSD_WObjAnim.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Preserved the byte layout of the former local Struct8000E210 by mapping its offsets into HSD_CObj: viewport fields at 0x0C-0x18, near/far at 0x38/0x3C, projection parameters starting at 0x40, and projection_type at 0x50.

The lbvector change is a type substitution rather than a broad rewrite: calls to func_8036A12C, func_80368784, func_80368E70, func_803686AC, and func_80369688 still operate on the same pointer, now typed as HSD_CObj*.
Union fields in HSD_CObj let one memory region match multiple projection interpretations without adding casts or separate fake structs.
The assert_line macro and surrounding math/projection code were left in place, suggesting the fix targeted type/include correctness rather than rematching the function body.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR context.
Because there was no human discussion excerpt, there is no direct reviewer rationale beyond the title and diff.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that modify src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.h or add cobj.c to validate and expand the HSD_CObj layout.
Search for func_8036A12C, func_80368784, func_80368E70, and func_803686AC to identify additional camera accessor names.
Check whether PROJ_FRUSTRUM is later used or renamed, since this PR only shows lbvector handling perspective and ortho cases.
Audit other files for local camera structs or raw offsets that can now be replaced with HSD_CObj.
